title: Mother Joan of the Angels
writer: Jaroslaw Iwaszkiewicz, Tadeusz Konwicki, Jerzy Kawalerowicz
actors: Lucyna Winnicka, Mieczyslaw Voit, Anna Ciepielewska
plot: A priest is sent to a small parish in the Polish countryside which is believed to be under demonic possession and there he finds his own temptations awaiting.
